thought.text: I'm encountering issues accessing weather information directly due to potential bot detection. Let me try a different approach by using the browser's search functionality again, but this time I'll use a more specific query and see if I can get results from a weather widget or forecast.

tool_call.name: browserbase_stagehand_navigate
tool_call.arguments: {"url":"https://www.weather.com/weather/today/l/Burbank+IL","security_risk":"LOW","summary":"Navigate to Weather.com for Burbank, IL using different URL format"}

summary: Navigate to Weather.com for Burbank, IL using different URL format
